commit.message:
LU-10810 test: extended debug for lseek test

Debug ARM test, not for landing

Test-Parameters: testgroup=review-ldiskfs-arm env=ONLY="425" testlist=sanity
Signed-off-by: Mikhail Pershin <mpershin@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I5c843fa81527ccce8bdd4f39c5247b11f0ed968d
